THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BROWN, GREGG RECOVER FROM APPELLANT PACIFIC STRUCTURES, INC. $150.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $150.00, $150.00 PRINCIPAL AS PAIN AND SUFFERING. PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY AND MEDICAL RECORDS SHOW PLAINTIFF SUFFERED DIZZINESS AND NAUSEA FOR 2 HOURS, WHICH RESOLVED AFTER 30 MINUTES. PLAINTIFF HAD NO ECONOMIC DAMAGES. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Gregg Brown Plaintiff/Respondent appears as Propria Persona.
Gregory R. Shaughnessy, Esq., (415)435-2409, for Defendant/Appellant PACIFIC STUCTURES, INS. with witness Jim Romero/Sight Attendant.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.

Gregg Brown, Plaintiff/Respondent, testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
EXHA (1) HOSPITAL EVALUATION PACKAGE.

Gregg Brown ross-examines Jim Romero.

Mr. Shaughnessy examines Jim Romero. The Following documentary evidence is intorduced:
EXHA (1) 7/11/2014 E-MAIL FROM MIKE MANN
EXHA (2) 7/28/14 PACIFIC STRUCTURES,INC LETTER TO SHAUN
EXHA (3) 7/28/14 LANGAN TREADWELL ROLLO LETTER TO MR. BARBIN
EXHA (4) 9/8/2014 RGA LETTER TO MR. MANN

Clerk give back counsel Shaughnessy his substitution of attorney form; the consent to the substitution was not signed by the person who is authorized to appear in Small Claims Court. Counsel is advised to file the substitution as soon as possible.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Appellant and respondent's exhibits are retained by the court.

Judge Pro tem Elliott Myles, Clerk J. Kong, not reported (D525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-11-2014 Judgment Entered
